extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against the parties: I counted the one criminal proceeding against the Company, the one statutory/regulatory proceeding against the Directors, and no tax proceedings against the Company or Group Companies; all "By" rows were excluded, and the nil Group Company litigation-against row was not counted. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹1.16 million, which converts to ₹0.116 crore; the Group Companies' litigation-against amount is explicitly NIL, so the aggregate against the Company and subsidiaries is ₹0.116 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is dated March 31, 2023 and has no stated Total row; summing the quantified items, ₹2.67 million plus ₹19.64 million, gives ₹22.31 million, or ₹2.231 crore, excluding the NIL claim item. The only disclosed percentages concern geographic regions, raw materials, products, and suppliers, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration; the source monetary tables use ₹ in millions, converted using 1 crore = 10 million.
